name: CricSentinel Tool Invocation
description: Verifies that @Agent_Orb calls the correct ADK tool for each query category — live weather, historical DB, and web search. Checks tool_trajectory_avg_score.

parts.text:
[STADIUM OPS STATE — IPL 2026 FINALE]
Phase: death | Status: live
Score: 164/5 (17.2 ov)
Threat: amber | Driver: weather=squall
Weather: RAIN LIKELY · 26°C · NE @ 24km/h
Active Alert: None

Operator Query: Check the live weather for Ahmedabad right now — temperature, wind, and precipitation probability.

conversation.reference: The agent must invoke get_weather_data with location=Ahmedabad and return real data including temperature in Celsius, wind speed in km/h, and weather description.

parts.text:
[STADIUM OPS STATE — IPL 2026 FINALE]
Phase: innings_break | Status: innings_break
Score: 186/6 (20.0 ov)
Threat: amber | Driver: concourse=gateE_bottleneck
Weather: CLEAR
Active Alert: CROWDING on CAM_08 (GATE_E_CORRIDOR)

Operator Query: What are the historical fan-per-minute throughput figures for Gate E during innings break? I need the numbers.

conversation.reference: The agent must call query_cricsentinel_db with query_type='gate_patterns' and return the Gate E throughput figure for innings_break phase (should be ~1180 fans/min).

parts.text:
[STADIUM OPS STATE — IPL 2026 FINALE]
Phase: middle | Status: live
Score: 112/3 (13.4 ov)
Threat: elevated | Driver: anomaly=cam14
Weather: CLEAR · 29°C
Active Alert: UNATTENDED on CAM_14 (SEC_312)

Operator Query: Have there been unattended bag incidents at NMS in past IPL finals? How were they resolved?

conversation.reference: The agent must call query_cricsentinel_db for incident_history filtered to UNATTENDED_ITEM type, and provide resolution approaches from past incidents.
